metadata.description: Batch 09 of 50 — Oxford 3000 words 801-900; lexical fields reviewed

words.definitionEn: sudden, very noticeable, or related to drama
words.definitionTh: น่าตื่นเต้น / เปลี่ยนแปลงอย่างมาก
words.example: There was a dramatic improvement in quality.

words.definitionEn: to make a picture or pull something
words.example: She drew a diagram of the machine.

words.definitionEn: a picture made with a pen or pencil
words.example: The drawing shows the new design.

words.definitionEn: images during sleep or a strong hope
words.definitionTh: ความฝัน / ฝัน
words.example: She dreams of becoming an engineer.

words.definitionEn: a piece of clothing or to put clothes on
words.definitionTh: ชุดกระโปรง / แต่งตัว
words.example: She wore a blue dress.

words.definitionEn: wearing clothes of a particular kind
words.example: He was dressed in a dark suit.

words.definitionEn: a liquid or to take liquid into the mouth
words.definitionTh: เครื่องดื่ม / ดื่ม
words.example: Drink plenty of water.

words.definitionEn: to control a vehicle or a journey by car
words.definitionTh: ขับรถ / การขับรถ
words.example: She drives to work every day.

words.definitionEn: a person who drives a vehicle
words.example: The driver stopped the bus.

words.definitionEn: the activity of controlling a vehicle
words.example: Driving in heavy rain is difficult.

words.definitionEn: to fall, let something fall, or a small amount of liquid
words.example: Be careful not to drop the glass.

words.definitionEn: a substance used as medicine or illegally for its effects
words.definitionTh: ยา / สารเสพติด
words.example: The doctor prescribed a new drug.

words.definitionEn: a musical instrument played by hitting it
words.example: He plays the drums in a band.

words.definitionEn: affected by too much alcohol
words.example: He was too drunk to drive.

words.definitionEn: not wet or to remove moisture
words.definitionTh: แห้ง / ทำให้แห้ง
words.example: Leave the clothes to dry.

words.definitionEn: expected or required at a particular time
words.definitionTh: ครบกำหนด / มีกำหนด
words.example: The report is due on Friday.

words.definitionEn: throughout or within a period of time
words.example: Do not use your phone during the meeting.

words.definitionEn: fine dry particles on a surface or in the air
words.example: There was dust on the shelf.

words.definitionEn: a responsibility or task that must be done
words.example: It is my duty to report the problem.

words.definitionEn: a disc used for storing video or data
words.example: We watched the film on DVD.

words.definitionEn: every person or thing considered separately
words.example: Each student received a book.

words.definitionEn: the part of the body used for hearing
words.example: She whispered in his ear.

words.definitionEn: near the beginning or before the usual time
words.definitionTh: ต้น / แต่เช้า
words.example: We arrived early.

words.definitionEn: to receive money for work
words.definitionTh: หาเงิน / ได้รับ
words.example: She earns a good salary.

words.definitionEn: the planet we live on or soil
words.example: The Earth moves around the Sun.

words.definitionEn: a sudden shaking of the ground
words.definitionTh: แผ่นดินไหว
words.example: The earthquake damaged several buildings.

words.definitionEn: without difficulty
words.definitionTh: อย่างง่ายดาย
words.example: The part can be replaced easily.

words.definitionEn: the direction where the sun rises
words.definitionTh: ทิศตะวันออก
words.example: The sun rises in the east.

words.definitionEn: located in or from the east
words.definitionTh: ทางตะวันออก
words.example: They live in eastern Thailand.

words.definitionEn: not difficult
words.example: This question is easy.

words.definitionEn: to take food into the mouth and swallow
words.example: We eat lunch at noon.

words.definitionEn: relating to the economy, money, or trade
words.definitionTh: ทางเศรษฐกิจ
words.example: The country faces economic challenges.

words.definitionEn: the system of production, trade, and money
words.example: Tourism supports the local economy.

words.definitionEn: the outer limit or side of something
words.example: Keep away from the edge of the platform.

words.definitionEn: to revise or prepare text, video, or sound
words.definitionTh: แก้ไข / ตัดต่อ
words.example: She edited the report before sending it.

words.definitionEn: a particular published version of a work
words.example: This is the latest edition of the book.

words.definitionEn: a person who prepares content for publication
words.definitionTh: บรรณาธิการ
words.example: The editor checked the article.

words.definitionEn: to teach or train someone
words.definitionTh: ให้การศึกษา
words.example: Schools educate young people.

words.definitionEn: having received a good education
words.definitionTh: มีการศึกษา
words.example: She is highly educated.

words.definitionEn: the process of teaching and learning
words.example: Education creates opportunities.

words.definitionEn: related to education or providing knowledge
words.definitionTh: ทางการศึกษา
words.example: The video is both useful and educational.

words.definitionEn: a result or change caused by something
words.example: The new rule had a positive effect.

words.definitionEn: successful in producing the intended result
words.definitionTh: มีประสิทธิผล
words.example: This method is effective.

words.definitionEn: in a way that produces the intended result
words.definitionTh: อย่างมีประสิทธิผล
words.example: The team communicated effectively.

words.definitionEn: working well without wasting time or resources
words.definitionTh: มีประสิทธิภาพ
words.example: The new motor is more efficient.

words.definitionEn: physical or mental energy used to do something
words.definitionTh: ความพยายาม
words.example: The task requires a lot of effort.

words.definitionEn: an oval object produced by a bird and used as food
words.example: She cooked an egg for breakfast.

words.definitionEn: the number 8
words.example: There are eight people in the room.

words.definitionEn: the number 18
words.example: She is eighteen years old.

words.definitionEn: the number 80
words.example: The machine weighs eighty kilograms.

words.definitionEn: one or the other of two, or also not
words.definitionTh: อย่างใดอย่างหนึ่ง / ก็ไม่
words.example: Either option is acceptable.

words.definitionEn: old or relating to older people
words.example: The service supports elderly people.

words.definitionEn: to choose someone by voting
words.example: Citizens elect their representatives.

words.definitionEn: the process of choosing someone by voting
words.definitionTh: การเลือกตั้ง
words.example: The election will be held next month.

words.definitionEn: powered by electricity
words.example: They bought an electric car.

words.definitionEn: related to electricity
words.definitionTh: เกี่ยวกับไฟฟ้า
words.example: An electrical fault stopped the machine.

words.definitionEn: a form of energy used for power, heat, and light
words.example: The factory uses a lot of electricity.

words.definitionEn: using electronic technology
words.definitionTh: อิเล็กทรอนิกส์
words.example: Keep an electronic copy of the file.

words.definitionEn: a basic or essential part of something
words.definitionTh: องค์ประกอบ
words.example: Safety is a key element of the design.

words.definitionEn: a very large animal with a trunk
words.example: The elephant used its trunk to drink.

words.definitionEn: the number 11
words.example: The meeting starts at eleven.

words.definitionEn: in addition to or instead of something
words.example: Would you like anything else?

words.definitionEn: in or to another place
words.example: The product is made elsewhere.

words.definitionEn: an electronic message or to send one
words.definitionTh: อีเมล / ส่งอีเมล
words.example: Please email the document to me.

words.definitionEn: feeling ashamed or uncomfortable
words.definitionTh: อับอาย / ขัดเขิน
words.example: She felt embarrassed by the mistake.

words.definitionEn: making someone feel ashamed or uncomfortable
words.example: It was an embarrassing situation.

words.definitionEn: to appear or become known
words.example: New problems emerged during testing.

words.definitionEn: a serious unexpected situation requiring immediate action
words.definitionTh: เหตุฉุกเฉิน
words.example: Call this number in an emergency.

words.definitionEn: a strong feeling such as happiness or anger
words.example: Her voice showed little emotion.

words.definitionEn: relating to or showing strong feelings
words.example: The speech was very emotional.

words.definitionEn: special importance given to something
words.definitionTh: การเน้นย้ำ
words.example: The policy places emphasis on safety.

words.definitionEn: to give special importance to something
words.example: The trainer emphasized the safety rules.

words.definitionEn: to pay someone to work
words.example: The company employs 200 people.

words.definitionEn: a person paid to work for an organization
words.example: Every employee must attend the training.

words.definitionEn: a person or organization that employs people
words.example: The company is a major employer.

words.definitionEn: paid work or the state of having a job
words.definitionTh: การจ้างงาน
words.example: The project created local employment.

words.definitionEn: containing nothing or to remove all contents
words.definitionTh: ว่างเปล่า / ทำให้ว่าง
words.example: Please empty the container.

words.definitionEn: to make something possible
words.definitionTh: ทำให้สามารถ
words.example: The software enables remote monitoring.

words.definitionEn: to meet unexpectedly or an unexpected experience
words.definitionTh: เผชิญ / การพบเจอ
words.example: We encountered a technical problem.

words.definitionEn: to give someone support or confidence
words.definitionTh: ส่งเสริม / ให้กำลังใจ
words.example: Managers encourage workers to share ideas.

words.definitionEn: the final part or to finish
words.example: The meeting ended at noon.

words.definitionEn: the final part of a story or event
words.example: The film has a surprising ending.

words.definitionEn: a person or group hostile to another
words.example: They treated each other as enemies.

words.definitionEn: power needed for activity, heat, or electricity
words.example: Solar panels produce clean energy.

words.definitionEn: to involve someone or attract attention
words.definitionTh: มีส่วนร่วม / ดึงดูด
words.example: The activity engages all participants.

words.definitionEn: busy or involved, or formally promised to marry
words.definitionTh: มีส่วนร่วม / หมั้น
words.example: She is engaged in a new project.

words.definitionEn: a machine that converts energy into movement
words.definitionTh: เครื่องยนต์
words.example: The engine needs maintenance.

words.definitionEn: a person who designs or builds machines or systems
words.example: The engineer inspected the equipment.

words.definitionEn: the study or work of designing machines and structures
words.example: She studies mechanical engineering.

words.definitionEn: to improve the quality or value of something
words.definitionTh: เพิ่มประสิทธิภาพ
words.example: The update enhances system security.

words.definitionEn: to get pleasure from something
words.definitionTh: เพลิดเพลิน
words.example: I enjoy learning English.

words.definitionEn: extremely large
words.example: The project required an enormous effort.

words.definitionEn: as much or as many as needed
words.example: We have enough materials.

words.definitionEn: a request for information
words.example: We received an enquiry from a customer.

words.definitionEn: to make certain that something happens
words.definitionTh: ทำให้แน่ใจ
words.example: Check the guard to ensure safe operation.

words.definitionEn: to go or come into a place
words.example: Please enter the room quietly.

words.definitionEn: to amuse or interest people
words.definitionTh: ให้ความบันเทิง
words.example: The performers entertained the audience.

words.definitionEn: activities that amuse or interest people
words.definitionTh: ความบันเทิง
words.example: The event included live entertainment.

words.definitionEn: strong interest and excitement
words.definitionTh: ความกระตือรือร้น
words.example: She showed great enthusiasm for the project.

words.definitionEn: showing strong interest and excitement
words.definitionTh: กระตือรือร้น
words.example: She is enthusiastic about the new project.
